entries.definition:
kh–f–f light load, a small group of people; camel’s foot, to travel at ease, (of camels) to travel in single file; to be light, to be light-hearted, to move quickly, to be quick-witted; to take lightly, to treat with contempt, to consider as easily influenced, to die. Of this root, seven forms occur 17 times in the Qur’an: خَفَّ khaffa three times; خَفَّفَ khaffafa three times; يُخَفَّفُ yukhaffaf five
273
